ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "EU" INTEGER /* EU size equivalent */,
  "FRANCE" INTEGER /* FRANCE size equivalent */,
  "UK" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "USA" INTEGER /* USA size equivalent */,
  "JP" INTEGER /* JP size equivalent */,
  "CHEST" TEXT /* CHEST measurement in CM */,
  "WAIST" TEXT /* WAIST measurement in CM */,
  "BUST" TEXT /* BUST measurement in CM */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size is currently active */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the size chart or example */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the item belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the item belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the item is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the item was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the item */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., EU, FRANCE, UK, USA, JP) */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard used in the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applicable in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the region is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the sale was made in */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sale record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sale record is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales analyst, customer service) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is currently active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the brand was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the brand */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the brand is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the customer account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the customer account is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
